99 C0400A_RCALL_FIRST_WORD_CD C0400A_RCALL_FIRST_WORD_CD C0400A BIMS: Recall - Able to Recall Sock CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies the resident's ability to recall the first word. -=Not assessed/no information
